title: Metaverse
html:
Metaverse

Stub. First explicit vault mention in 2021 10 28 ar vr metaverse thesis, captured four days after Facebook's Oct-28-2021 rebrand to Meta. Yahir flagged AR/VR + metaverse + crypto/gaming + AI as a four-vector thesis the week the term went mainstream.
